blended.narrative: Crystal Mountain Michigan is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 27 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,054 ft. Looking ahead, 33 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Tomorrow: 13" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 15°F. Expect powder.
